subgoal: Tap the suggested recipient email to confirm it in the To field
acceptance_criteria: Success means the tapped suggested email address becomes a confirmed recipient in the To field (typically as a chip in the recipient chip group), and the autocomplete suggestion list is dismissed or reduced, while remaining on the email compose screen.

llm_result.reason: After the tap, the recipient appears as a confirmed entry in the To/recipients chip group (with accessibility desc 'Recipients: 221240051@smail.nju.edu.cn,'), and the suggestions/autocomplete list is no longer shown, while remaining on the compose screen.

notable_changes: Recipient '221240051@smail.nju.edu.cn' is now shown as confirmed in recipients/chip group (desc indicates confirmed recipients)
Autocomplete suggestions list/recyclerview is no longer present
Still on compose email screen with Send/From/Subject visible

suspicious_signals: expected_activity_matched=false (activity unknown), but UI semantics match compose state and recipient confirmation

final.reason: After the tap, the recipient appears as a confirmed entry in the To/recipients chip group (with accessibility desc 'Recipients: 221240051@smail.nju.edu.cn,'), and the suggestions/autocomplete list is no longer shown, while remaining on the compose screen.
